title: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio website showcasing my projects, professional experience, and backend experiments, built with Clean Architecture and CQRS.

title: Mohajer
description: AI-powered web app guiding Iranians through emigration decisions, built with Clean Architecture and CQRS, integrating the Claude API for AI-driven guidance.

title: OutRight
description: E-commerce web app for gaming products, with a React frontend and a separate Node.js/Express REST API handling authentication, products, and orders.

title: OutRight API
description: REST API powering OutRight, handling authentication, product catalog, and order management with PostgreSQL and JWT-based auth.

title: Rockify
description: Music streaming web app frontend with a React interface for browsing and playing tracks, connected to a custom Node.js backend.

title: Rockify API
description: Backend service for Rockify, exposing REST APIs for authentication, track/playlist data, and file uploads with PostgreSQL.
